aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite JoyTech Mechanical due to limited conversational content and missing authority signals. Their current site is optimized for traditional SEO but lacks the depth needed for AI-driven recommendations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content to address common HVAC queries.
Add HowTo schema for popular services like ductless mini-split installation.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but Q&A section lacks engagement.
critical_issues: Q&A section is inactive with no customer or business interaction.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Seek additional local directory listings to reinforce citations.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and authority signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'best HVAC services in Queens Village, NY'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content and HowTo schema for common services.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Be the top HVAC recommendation for AI assistants in Queens Village.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their site lacks FAQ content and detailed schema markup, making it less attractive to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will integrate conversational content, optimize schema markup, and enhance authority signals to make JoyTech Mechanical a go-to HVAC expert for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; the longer they wait, the more ground they lose.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your HVAC Business Deserves to Be Top of Mind
opening_line: After analyzing your website and Google Business Profile, we found significant opportunities to make your HVAC services stand out to AI assistants and voice search users.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
